/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libsorting_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so -o libsorting_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so CMakeFiles/sorting_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c/sorting_interfaces/msg/detail/detected_object__type_support.c.o CMakeFiles/sorting_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c/sorting_interfaces/msg/detail/detected_object_array__type_support.c.o CMakeFiles/sorting_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c/sorting_interfaces/msg/detail/sort_task__type_support.c.o CMakeFiles/sorting_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c/sorting_interfaces/msg/detail/execution_status__type_support.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/rcli/ws_sorting_final/build/sorting_interfaces:/opt/ros/jazzy/lib: libsorting_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libgeometry_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libgeometry_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
